message:
Backfill and poll per-account to get all chats across all networks

The global /v1/chats endpoint caps at ~375 results sorted by
lastActivity, causing older chats (especially iMessage) to be dropped.
Now iterates each account separately using the accountIDs filter,
which returns all chats for that account.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
